title: Midpoint Exam
intendedTensionBeat: The central choke must be opened before dock, water, and blockers compound.
intendedReleaseBeat: Taking the choke early makes the board branch cleanly into two rescues.
expectedPath: Open the central choke, rescue the urgent target, then pivot to the safer target.
expectedFailMode: Player over-collects dock value or side clears before opening the choke.
designNotes: This is the first real exam. Do not introduce new rules here.
